calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kristen Drake, ESQ. 415-247-7900 for defendants and moving party
Patrick J. Hill, ESQ. 415-538-3333 for Plaintiff and opposing party

DEFENDANT FISCAL DYNAMICS INC., WALTER SCAMEHORN and JOE KAISER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

The Court having reviewd all submitted pleadings and hearing oral argument, takes the matter under submission. Judge: Ronald Quidacahy; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Drohan, Esq. (415-538-3333) of Legal Assistance to the Elderly for Plaintiff/Moving party Lawrence Moore.
No other Appearances.

Plaintiff reports they are close to settling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant''s Motion for Summary Judgment is Continued to August 24, 2015 for parties to submit supplemental briefing re: the scope and use of the deposition errata in light of D''Amico v. Board of Medical Examiners (1974) 11 Cal.3d 1 and Hambleton Bros. Lumber Co. v. Balking Enterprises, Inc. (2005) 397 F. 3d 1217. Supplemental briefs shall no exceed 5 pages and shall be filed no later than August 19, 2015. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Continued To Mar-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2014 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
